behavior_in_task_description.reason: Instruction specifies the JSON response schemas, header name 'req-id', edge runtime requirement, Response.json() usage, fixture file location, fetchViaHTTP usage, Promise.all concurrency, and prohibition on createNext inside it/test bodies — all things tests check.

no_solution_leakage.reason: Instruction describes what's broken (race condition, inline strings) and required outcomes but doesn't prescribe nextTestSetup or specific code changes.

solution_uniqueness_guard.reason: Tests check for fixture files under pages/api or app/api with flexible regex (_find_fixture), behavioral output via mocked execution, and absence of createNext in test bodies — alternative correct fixes (e.g., using beforeAll vs nextTestSetup) would still pass.

tests_verify_behavior_not_text.reason: Tests execute fixture handlers via Node subprocess with mocked Request/Response and assert on actual JSON output, plus AST-based detection of createNext placement.

test_not_tautological.reason: f2p tests require actual handler execution returning correct id/nestedId values from AsyncLocalStorage — a stub couldn't satisfy the runtime behavior check.

behavior_in_tests.reason: All instruction-required behaviors (two handlers with correct schemas, edge runtime via fixture files, fetchViaHTTP, Promise.all with req-id, no createNext in test body) are tested.

informative_test_structure.reason: Tests are grouped with section comments (Fail-to-pass, Pass-to-pass, Config-derived) and named descriptively.

structured_data_schema.reason: Instruction documents the exact JSON schemas {"id": "<id>"} and {"id": "<id>", "nestedId": "nested-<id>"}.

no_typos.reason: Paths and identifiers (test/e2e/edge-async-local-storage/index.test.ts, fetchViaHTTP, req-id) match across files.

instruction_no_hint_leakage.reason: Instruction names the test file (which is the task target) but doesn't point at specific buggy lines or prescribe the fix mechanism.

config_edit_scope_bounded.reason: Code-only task, no AGENTS.md config edits required.
